-- Dumping structure for table ppm_dies_monitoring.customers
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `customers` (
  `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `code` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `contact_person` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `email` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `address` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `customers_code_unique` (`code`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=8 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Dumping structure for table ppm_dies_monitoring.dies
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dies` (
  `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `part_number` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `part_name` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `model` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `machine_model_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
  `customer_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
  `lot_size` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '600',
  `ppm_standard` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '6000',
  `qty_die` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `dies_size` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `line` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `process_type` varchar(30) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Process type: blank_pierce, draw, embos, trim, form, flang, restrike, pierce, cam_pierce',
  `die_group` varchar(21) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `group_name` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `group_id` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_4lot_check` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `accumulate_related_parts` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'If true, stroke accumulation is shared across dies with the same base part number',
  `accumulation_stroke` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `ppm_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `stroke_at_last_ppm` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `last_stroke` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `control_stroke` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_ppm_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `location` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('active','inactive','maintenance','disposed') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `ppm_alert_status` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `ppm_scheduled_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `ppm_scheduled_by` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `schedule_remark` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `schedule_change_reason` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `schedule_cancelled_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `schedule_cancelled_by` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `schedule_approved_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `schedule_approved_by` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `red_alerted_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `ppm_started_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `ppm_finished_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `returned_to_production_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `ppm_total_days` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_lot_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_lot_date_set_by` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `transferred_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `transferred_by` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `transfer_from_location` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `transfer_to_location` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `mtn_remark` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `ppic_remark` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `dies_machine_model_id_foreign` (`machine_model_id`),
  KEY `dies_customer_id_foreign` (`customer_id`),
  KEY `dies_part_number_index` (`part_number`),
  KEY `dies_status_index` (`status`),
  CONSTRAINT `dies_customer_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`customer_id`) REFERENCES `customers` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `dies_machine_model_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`machine_model_id`) REFERENCES `machine_models` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1215 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Dumping structure for table ppm_dies_monitoring.die_change_logs
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `die_change_logs` (
  `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `die_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
  `user_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `part_number` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `part_name` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `changed_fields` json NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `die_change_logs_die_id_created_at_index` (`die_id`,`created_at`),
  KEY `die_change_logs_user_id_index` (`user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `die_change_logs_die_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`die_id`) REFERENCES `dies` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `die_change_logs_user_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=44 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Dumping structure for table ppm_dies_monitoring.die_processes
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `die_processes` (
  `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `die_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
  `process_type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `process_order` tinyint(3) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `ppm_status` enum('pending','in_progress','completed') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `lot_check_status` enum('pending','in_progress','completed') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `lot_check_started_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `lot_check_completed_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `ppm_started_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `ppm_completed_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `ppm_history_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `completed_by` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `lot_check_history_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `lot_check_completed_by` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `die_processes_die_id_process_type_process_order_unique` (`die_id`,`process_type`,`process_order`),
  KEY `die_processes_ppm_history_id_foreign` (`ppm_history_id`),
  KEY `die_processes_die_id_ppm_status_index` (`die_id`,`ppm_status`),
  KEY `die_processes_lot_check_history_id_foreign` (`lot_check_history_id`),
  KEY `die_processes_die_id_lot_check_status_index` (`die_id`,`lot_check_status`),
  CONSTRAINT `die_processes_die_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`die_id`) REFERENCES `dies` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `die_processes_lot_check_history_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`lot_check_history_id`) REFERENCES `ppm_histories` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `die_processes_ppm_history_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`ppm_history_id`) REFERENCES `ppm_histories` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=66 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Dumping structure for table ppm_dies_monitoring.failed_jobs
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `failed_jobs` (
  `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `uuid` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `connection` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `queue` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `payload` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `exception` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `failed_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `failed_jobs_uuid_unique` (`uuid`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Dumping data for table ppm_dies_monitoring.failed_jobs: ~0 rows (approximately)

-- Dumping structure for table ppm_dies_monitoring.import_logs
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `import_logs` (
  `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `type` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `file_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('success','failed') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'success',
  `imported_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `skipped_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `accumulated_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `skipped_rows` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `error_message` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `user_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `import_logs_user_id_foreign` (`user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `import_logs_user_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=25 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Dumping structure for table ppm_dies_monitoring.password_reset_tokens
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `password_reset_tokens` (
  `email` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `token` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`email`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- Dumping data for table ppm_dies_monitoring.password_reset_tokens: ~0 rows (approximately)

-- Dumping structure for table ppm_dies_monitoring.ppm_histories
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ppm_histories` (
  `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `die_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
  `ppm_date` date NOT NULL,
  `stroke_at_ppm` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `ppm_number` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Which PPM number this is (1st, 2nd, 3rd, etc)',
  `process_type` varchar(30) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Process type used during this PPM inspection',
  `checklist_results` json DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'JSON array of checklist inspection results',
  `illustration_path` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `pic` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('done','pending','cancelled','partial') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'done',
  `maintenance_type` enum('routine','repair','overhaul','emergency','4lc_maintenance') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'routine',
  `work_performed` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `parts_replaced` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `findings` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `recommendations` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `checked_by` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `approved_by` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `ppm_histories_created_by_foreign` (`created_by`),
  KEY `ppm_histories_die_id_ppm_date_index` (`die_id`,`ppm_date`),
  CONSTRAINT `ppm_histories_created_by_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`created_by`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `ppm_histories_die_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`die_id`) REFERENCES `dies` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE

-- Dumping structure for table ppm_dies_monitoring.ppm_schedules
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ppm_schedules` (
  `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `die_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
  `year` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `month` tinyint(4) NOT NULL,
  `week` tinyint(4) NOT NULL,
  `forecast_stroke` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `plan_week` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_done` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `actual_stroke` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `ppm_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `lot4_check_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `pic` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `updated_by` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,

-- Dumping structure for table ppm_dies_monitoring.production_logs
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `production_logs` (
  `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `die_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
  `model` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `production_date` date NOT NULL,
  `shift` tinyint(4) NOT NULL,
  `line` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `running_process` enum('Auto','Manual','Blanking') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'Auto',
  `start_time` time DEFAULT NULL,
  `finish_time` time DEFAULT NULL,
  `total_hours` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `total_minutes` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `break_time` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `output_qty` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `month` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `production_logs_created_by_foreign` (`created_by`),
  KEY `production_logs_production_date_index` (`production_date`),
  KEY `production_logs_die_id_production_date_index` (`die_id`,`production_date`),
  CONSTRAINT `production_logs_created_by_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`created_by`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `production_logs_die_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`die_id`) REFERENCES `dies` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1064 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sessions` (
  `id` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `user_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `ip_address` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `user_agent` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `payload` longtext COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `last_activity` int(11) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `sessions_user_id_index` (`user_id`),
  KEY `sessions_last_activity_index` (`last_activity`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

  `priority` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'high',
  `status` varchar(30) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `reason` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `requested_by` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `approved_by` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `requested_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `approved_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `started_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `completed_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,

  `work_performed` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `parts_replaced` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `findings` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `recommendations` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `is_ppm_interrupted` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `is_urgent_delivery` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `delivery_deadline` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `customer_po` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `estimated_hours` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `actual_hours` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,

  `previous_location` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,

  `created_by` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `special_dies_repairs_die_id_foreign` (`die_id`),
  KEY `special_dies_repairs_created_by_foreign` (`created_by`),
  CONSTRAINT `special_dies_repairs_created_by_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`created_by`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `special_dies_repairs_die_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`die_id`) REFERENCES `dies` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE

-- Dumping structure for table ppm_dies_monitoring.user_messages
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user_messages` (
  `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `sender_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
  `receiver_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `receiver_role` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `die_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `subject` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `message` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `priority` enum('normal','urgent','critical') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'normal',
  `category` enum('coordination','schedule_change','urgent_issue','ppm_update','general') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',
  `parent_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_read` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `read_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `user_messages_parent_id_foreign` (`parent_id`),
  KEY `user_messages_receiver_id_is_read_index` (`receiver_id`,`is_read`),
  KEY `user_messages_receiver_role_is_read_index` (`receiver_role`,`is_read`),
  KEY `user_messages_sender_id_created_at_index` (`sender_id`,`created_at`),
  KEY `user_messages_die_id_index` (`die_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `user_messages_die_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`die_id`) REFERENCES `dies` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `user_messages_parent_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`parent_id`) REFERENCES `user_messages` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `user_messages_receiver_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`receiver_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `user_messages_sender_id_foreign` FOREIGN KEY (`sender_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=2 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
